_comment: Copy to deploy.config.json and fill in identifiers for your existing Azure resources. Every script reads from this single file. NEVER commit deploy.config.json -- it is per-environment and is in .gitignore.
_modelProvider_comment: Set to 'foundry' to use Azure AI Foundry for the chat/vision calls (this is what you deployed). Set to 'aoai' only if you use a classic Azure OpenAI resource. When 'foundry', the function app's summary/vision calls use the 'foundry' block below.

foundry._comment: Your Azure AI Foundry resource. Used by the FUNCTION APP for chat + vision (summary/diagram). Get these from the Foundry portal -> your project -> Endpoints/Keys. The key is fetched at runtime via 'az cognitiveservices account keys list' on the resource named in projectEndpoint's host.

azureOpenAI._comment: NOT a separate Azure OpenAI resource. This points at YOUR FOUNDRY resource's OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Azure AI Search's built-in embedding skill + query vectorizer only speak the Azure-OpenAI protocol, so they must use this .openai.azure.us endpoint. endpoint + embedDeployment are the ONLY fields that matter in foundry mode (they feed the search index vectorizer + embedding skillset). embedDeployment MUST be a 1536-dim model (text-embedding-ada-002) to match the index's text_vector field.

aiServices._comment: The Cognitive/AI Services multi-service account the SKILLSET attaches to (for the DI Layout skill + built-in skills). Its subdomain URL.

cosmos._comment: Optional. If set, scripts persist run history + per-PDF state here (used by reconcile edit-detection and the dashboard). Leave blank to disable.
